template.name: Reservation Link
template.title: Reservation Link

td.style: padding: 50px 0 50px 0;
font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 300;
padding: 0 15px 0 15px;
padding: 30px 30px 0 30px;
padding: 0 0 15px 0; font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color:black; font-weight: 300;
padding: 0 0 5px 0;
padding: 0 0 0 0; font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; line-height: 22px; text-align: left;
padding: 0 0 0 0; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #333333; font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 15px; line-height: 22px; text-align: left;
padding: 0 0 5px 0;

padding-bottom: 40px;
padding: 0 0 0 0;
padding: 0 0 0 0; font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; line-height: 22px; text-align: left;

t.t-if: o.summary or o.flights_pkg or o.hotel_pkg or o.transportation_pkg or o.tours_pkg or o.visa_pkg or o.packages_pkg or o.privatejet_pkg or o.yacht_pkg or o.otherservices_pkg

td.style: text-transform: capitalize !important;
